Container.Name: SOCKS5 Proxy
Container.Overview: Lightweight SOCKS5 proxy server with optional username/password authentication. Leave PROXY_USER and PROXY_PASSWORD empty to allow unauthenticated access (LAN only — do NOT expose unauthenticated to WAN).
Container.Description: Lightweight SOCKS5 proxy server with optional username/password authentication.

Config.Name: Username
Config.Description: Username for SOCKS5 authentication. Leave blank for no auth (LAN use only).

Config.Name: Password
Config.Description: Password for SOCKS5 authentication. Leave blank for no auth (LAN use only).

Config.Name: Require Auth
Config.Description: Set to false to allow unauthenticated access. Only disable if access is restricted by network (e.g. Tailscale/VPN).

Config.Name: Allowed Destination IPs
Config.Description: Optional comma-separated list of allowed destination FQDNs/IPs. Leave blank to allow all destinations.
